## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe feature you want.

Explain benefit to users, contributors, or runtime behavior.

## Alternatives considered

## Additional context

Add screenshots, logs, target apps, or Windows-specific constraints when relevant.
